title: sorbus aria var. cyclophylla
intro: Sorbus aria var. cyclophylla, also known as the whitebeam tree, is a deciduous tree or shrub belonging to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Sorbus aria var. cyclophylla lie in its bark, leaves, and fruits, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin problems. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Sorbus aria var. cyclophylla include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
